description: Zoom Feed (from scratch): a NoneRequired auth profile (a no-auth feed that only pulls public Zoom IP/domain lists) must be treated as an ANONYMOUS connector. The generator must NOT raise on the 'NoneRequired' profile type; it emits NO connection.yaml and the handler capability uses the anonymous shape (auth: 'none' + capability-level workloads, no auth_options). other_connection (insecure, proxy) carries no auth, so it has no connection profile to attach to.
